title: Starboard
subtitle: Highlight the best messages by collecting star reactions into a dedicated channel.

settings.title: Starboard Configuration
settings.description: Configure when and where starred messages are posted.
settings.channelIdDesc: The channel where starred messages are posted.
settings.starEmojiDesc: The emoji used to star messages. Defaults to the star emoji.
settings.thresholdDesc: Minimum number of reactions required to post a message to the starboard.
settings.selfStarDesc: Allow message authors to star their own messages.
settings.nsfwAllowedDesc: Allow messages from NSFW channels to appear on the starboard.
settings.ignoredChannelsDesc: Messages from these channels will never appear on the starboard.
